metadata.description: Cross-model verification skills for AI collaboration

plugins.name: codex-buddy
plugins.description: Cross-model verification via Claude-Codex collaboration. Provides verification levels (V0-V3), evidence packaging, and structured dialogue protocols for breaking single-model echo chambers.

plugins.name: nana
plugins.description: Session handoff for Claude Code. Save context before closing a session, restore it in a new session with structured 3-layer recovery protocol.
